markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content feedback, align on workflows, and analyze October performance.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content quality requires immediate improvement.** Recent articles contained basic AP style errors and nonsensical anchor text ("AI-powered self-serve tool") that must be eliminated to protect brand integrity.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [**October performance is strong,** with \~20% MoM growth in sessions and engaged sessions, driven by recent article refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**Industry pages are a new focus.** GrowthX is piloting an "editorial custom" approach on legal, architect, and car repair pages to ensure unique, high-quality content.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [**A new creative agency, Superside, is being evaluated** to provide broader marketing support (e.g., ads, collateral) than the current web-focused agency, Aether.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality & Workflow

  - [**Problem:** Recent articles had basic errors (AP style, grammar) and nonsensical anchor text ("AI-powered self-serve tool").](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [**Impact:** This low-quality content undermines brand authority and wastes valuable backlink equity.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX will update internal workflows to prevent these errors.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
      - [**Anchor Text:** Link only from clear, branded terms like "AI receptionist" (capitalized).](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
      - [**Workflow:** Tag Jo and Usman for all content feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
          - [**Jo:** Strategy, performance, strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
          - [**Usman:** Production, workflow execution.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
          - [**Megan:** Initial project setup and Webflow configuration.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)

### October Performance Analysis

  - [**Traffic Growth:** \~20% MoM growth in sessions and engaged sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [**Top Pages:** "7 Best Automation Receptionists," "Best Customer Service Examples," and the Small Business company page.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [**SEO:**](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
      - [Position 1 keywords grew 37% MoM.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
      - [Positions 2–10 saw an 8% drop, highlighting the need for ongoing refreshes to maintain visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
  - [**Conversions:**](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
      - [**Top Drivers:** Interior Designer and Answering Service industry pages.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
      - [**Key Trend:** Home services drove 6 signups, validating the refresh strategy for this pillar.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)
  - [**LLM Traffic:**](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
      - [**Volume:** Low (77 sessions from ChatGPT), but engagement is high.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
      - [**Intent:** Leads from LLMs have intent between demand gen and organic search.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1677.0)

### Project Updates

  - [**Article Publishing:** The current batch will be published without staging.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
      - [**Images:** AI-generated images will be used. GrowthX can update the workflow with Smith.ai's brand guidelines (colors, codes) for higher quality.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [**Industry Pages:** Megan is piloting a new "editorial custom" approach on legal, architect, and car repair pages to ensure unique content.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [**VR Article Refreshes:** Updates are in progress.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
      - [**Process:** SEO optimization, content expansion, and SERP analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
      - [**Review:** New content will be highlighted for easy identification.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
  - [**Analytics Deep Dive:** In progress.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
      - [Publish the current article batch.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
      - [Update internal workflows to prevent quality issues.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
      - [Complete VR article refreshes this week.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
      - [Continue work on the analytics deep dive.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
  - [**Megan:**](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)
      - [Check with the GrowthX team about their experience with Superside.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)
      - [Review the CD pages.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
      - [Pilot the new industry page workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [**Maddy:**](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
      - [Review the CD pages.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
      - [Prepare to discuss LLM prompt performance in more detail next week.](https://fathom.video/share/qDfsTbLgrh_nRZtjzqr8-xH2N_qUtCFg?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
